programme.desc: Giulia must make a decision about her personal life that will also affect her career; Martina gives the most challenging exam of her life; Ric is forced to come to terms with Alba's ghost; Lin and Federico resume working on the database.

programme.title: Focus[Live]
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: King Charles is scheduled to visit the US in late April to meet with President Trump, as relations between the US and UK PM Keir Starmer sour over Iran and the Strait of Hormuz. Chas and John guide you through the week.

programme.title: E79
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: E3 - Where Are They Now - Episode 3
programme.desc: Lisa reconnects with more of our Muster Dogs participants. Frank continues uplifting the community nursing home residents, Aticia embraces motherhood, Russ faces drought pressures, and Joni's dog Chet welcomes four new pups.

programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

E108 - Tiny Dancer / The Sleepy Sun
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back. // The sun won't set because it can't fall asleep! Dora needs to find Pillow Cloud so Sol can set.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E103 - Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: E102 - Bada-Bam / The Barbamartians
programme.desc: Barbabright captured a melody from Mars. The Barbapapas build a rocket to go to the red planet. // While travelling to Mars, the Barbapapas meet a family of Barbamartians. They have no time to get acquainted when a giant plant attacks the village.

programme.title: E109 - Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E107 - Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E416 - Shake, Rattle And Bang
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle gives the class a music lesson. There's lots of crashing and banging at first, but it's not long before the grown-ups visit and lay down some notes of their own.

programme.title: E419 - Mr Fox's Van
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig needs a new watch, Mr Fox finds three grandfather clocks in the back of his van. Three clocks are much better than one. Mr Fox has everything in his van – even a chicken!

programme.title: E410 - Grampy Rabbit's Lighthouse
programme.desc: Granddad Dog takes Peppa, George and Danny Dog to visit Grampy Rabbit's lighthouse.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E816 - Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E107 - Mammoth
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia find a lost mammoth in their house.

programme.title: E103 - Boris / Born To Be Wild
programme.desc: The barbababies find a lost baby elephant and secretly look after it. How will Barbapapa and Barbamama react to Boris? // Boris the elephant misses home. The Barbapapa decide to bring him back to Africa. On the spot, they help Boris to acclimatize.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E219 - Rebels / Barbascience
programme.desc: Barbidur and Barbalala become little rebels. // But who are the Barbapapa?

programme.title: E204 - The Floor Is Guava / We Are The Grumples
programme.desc: Boots wants to enjoy Banana Fest, but the Guava Geyser is erupting! Dora needs to stop the geyser and save the festival. / It's Picture Day, but the Grumpy Old Troll runs away! Dora follows him into Troll World to get him to come out for the picture.

programme.title: E821 - Roman Day
programme.desc: Granny Pig, Peppa and George have fun dressing up as Romans, making a pebble mosaic and learning a little Latin!

programme.title: E121 - Greedyguts / Where Is Bali?
programme.desc: A goat has escaped from the mountain and is coming to wreak havoc, devouring everything in its path! // Bali is nowhere to be found, and the Barbapapa deploy all their imagination to look for her. They have no idea that a nice surprise awaits them!

programme.title: Following the Fibre Optic Trail
programme.desc: How do data and information travel from one computer to another? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of fibre optics. Have hands-on fun by creating fibre optic strands, and get to know Charles Kuen Kao, the godfather of broadband transmission.

programme.title: Fire Team Doki
programme.desc: After a false fire alarm at the clubhouse, the team is very impressed with the firefighters who answer the call. What does it take to be a firefighter? Firefighter Domenic offers to train the team at the fire hall, so they can see for themselves!

programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: Trip to Reunion
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are surprised by wasps during lunch. Alim says they should be happy to see them. To explain, he takes them to Reunion Island. During a picnic, a swarm of wasps causes panic, but Zoe and Milo learn that on this island, wasps are actually a popular delicacy.

programme.title: Fico's Floaties
programme.desc: A rubber duck has been found on a beach with Fico's name on it! Fico lost it on a trip last year! But how did Fico's duck travel so far? The team flies off to recover the duck. The trail leads to an oceanographic research ship.

programme.title: Fico's Floaties
programme.desc: A rubber duck has been found on a beach with Fico's name on it! Fico lost it on a trip last year! But how did Fico's duck travel so far? The team flies off to recover the duck. The trail leads to an oceanographic research ship.

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: The Big Stink
programme.desc: When Darwin and Newts smell something odd wafting through the forest, they discover a geyser and hot pools, and learn how they work.

programme.title: Sensational Solubles!
programme.desc: Eric is not sure what soluble means. To find out, he makes a snow globe and compares things that are soluble in water with things that are not.

programme.title: Squirrel
programme.desc: Grey is super excited to see squirrels on TV. Grandad Badger is not too impressed by the eating habits of the squirrels. And Mommy and Daddy Owl are amazed to discover that the squirrels' incisor teeth never stop growing.

programme.title: Vispy Kharadi: Martial Arts Strong Man
programme.desc: Serial GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS record-breaker and skilled martial artist Vispy Kharadi reveals what it takes to become the best and demonstrates some martial arts moves and self-defense techniques.

programme.title: Sensational Solubles!
programme.desc: Eric is not sure what soluble means. To find out, he makes a snow globe and compares things that are soluble in water with things that are not.

programme.title: Folded Paper, Hopping Frog
programme.desc: Can you turn a two-dimensional sheet of paper into a three-dimensional hopping frog? In this episode we explain the geometry behind paper folding and teach you how to create your own 3D aquarium! Crock, crock!

programme.title: A Fright to Behold
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts celebrate Halloween by trick or treating with their forest friends.

programme.title: Trip to Reunion
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are surprised by wasps during lunch. Alim says they should be happy to see them. To explain, he takes them to Reunion Island. During a picnic, a swarm of wasps causes panic, but Zoe and Milo learn that on this island, wasps are actually a popular delicacy.

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.title: The Big Stink
programme.desc: When Darwin and Newts smell something odd wafting through the forest, they discover a geyser and hot pools, and learn how they work.

programme.title: The Best Dinosaur
programme.desc: Yoko's magic transforms toy dinosaurs into real-live creatures, and the kids compete to figure out which dinosaur is best!

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: Terminal Velocity
programme.desc: With their textbook back in hand, the group returns to their main mission of finding the secret lab – only to be stumped by the latest riddle. Joy proposes a solution that reveals a shocking secret from Raign's past.

programme.title: The Firefighter (Sabrina Cohen-Hatton) and The Bionic Man (Mark Ormrod)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Sabrina Cohen-Hatton, the most senior ranking firefighter in the UK, and Mark Ormrod, triple amputee and four-time Invictus Games gold medallist, share their incredible stories of resilience.

programme.title: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: When a message in a bottle washes up on shore, Darwin and Newts must use their knot knowledge to follow the trail to some pirate treasure.

programme.title: Mission: Mix Impossible!
programme.desc: Eric learns that a mixture of oil and vinegar will always end up separating because they have different densities. Shaking them will blend them again for a while. He does an experiment mixing different densities and gets some surprising results.

programme.title: Trip to Japan - Part I
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo do not seem to know that there is a place on Earth where it is not at all polite to open a present in front of the person that gave it to you. Alim suggests bringing his friends to Japan, where they meet Kimiko.

programme.title: The Black Death
programme.desc: The Black Plague is running rampant through Europe, leaving death and destruction in its wake! This episode provides a catalog of the effects the plague has on the human body and the various weird and wonderful cures dreamed up by the contemporary medics.

programme.title: The Big Stink
programme.desc: When Darwin and Newts smell something odd wafting through the forest, they discover a geyser and hot pools, and learn how they work.

programme.title: Following the Fibre Optic Trail
programme.desc: How do data and information travel from one computer to another? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of fibre optics. Have hands-on fun by creating fibre optic strands, and get to know Charles Kuen Kao, the godfather of broadband transmission.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 講述兩名截然不同的人 ─ 缺乏同情心的騙子與同情心氾濫的律師因與邪惡抗爭，組成了一支看起來不太可能實現的聯盟後所發生的故事。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 講述婦產科醫生雖然看起來擁有財富、名譽和外貌，卻是一個孤獨至極的人物。她從崩潰的家庭中逃離出來，某天遇到了唯一能夠看穿她的孤獨的男人，重新找回家庭關係並成長的故事。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E8 - Whatever Floats Your Boat
programme.desc: With more shoreline than Florida, Kentucky is a hotbed for houseboats. For this elimination challenge, the chefs are split into two teams and tasked with throwing raging party in Lake Cumberland. Mega-chef Emeril Lagasse joins Padma, Tom and Nilou along with Captains Sandy and Lee from Below Deck for some houseboat hysteria.

programme.desc: When his human friends and animal friends both accidentally get invited to his birthday bash at the local pizza palace, Adam has to find ways to keep the two groups apart or risk embarrassing himself in front of his old school's BMOC.

programme.title: E20 - She's Koala That
programme.desc: Ignoring warnings from his pals, Adam befriends a sad little koala named Deidre.

programme.title: E9 - Music City Usa
programme.desc: The chefs take a roadtrip to Nashville and have the honor of cooking on the stage of the Grand Ole Opry for country music sensation Hunter Hayes. Then they have to dig deep to create a dish inspired by a vibrant music memory. It’s a personal and emotional cook as the chefs put their hearts on a plate for a full table of Nashville food and music giants including Kings of Leon frontman Caleb Followill, model Lily Aldridge, and Chef Jonathan Waxman.

E101
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E13 - The Paulin Brothers
programme.desc: The Paulin brothers grew up in Le Reposoir, a small village nestled in the heart of the Aravis, and each chose his own way to live the mountain to the extreme. One walks barefoot on a slackline stretched between two dizzying points, the other climbs the most demanding faces of the Mont-Blanc massif.

programme.title: E1 - The Music Of Transmission/Freshwater Surfer
programme.desc: Nature, tradition and rock'n'roll, for the Bonvins it's a family story. Paul and his children form a group: Paul Mac Bonvin & The Bullfrogs. Steeve Fleury is stand-up paddle champion and artist. Whether riding them or drawing them, waves and water are his passions.

programme.title: E38 - In Uzes (3)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Uzes, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the national stud farm of Uzes and in the black truffle.

programme.desc: Nature, tradition and rock'n'roll, for the Bonvins it's a family story. Paul and his children form a group: Paul Mac Bonvin & The Bullfrogs. Steeve Fleury is stand-up paddle champion and artist. Whether riding them or drawing them, waves and water are his passions.

programme.title: E13 - The Paulin Brothers

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Gising Pilipinas[Live]
programme.desc: Morning Newscast

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]

Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Gising Pilipinas[Live]
programme.desc: Morning Newscast

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: E5 - Staircase Shooter Or Defensive Dad?
programme.desc: An angry confrontation leads to a 31-year-old father facing life behind bars after shooting his ex-girlfriend's boyfriend in the leg. He insists he was defending his ex and their child from an intruder.

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

Anchored by Joe Kernen, Becky Quick and Andrew Ross Sorkin, the show brings Wall Street to Main Street. It's a must-see for everyone from the professional trader to the casual investor.

programme.title: Squawk On The Street
programme.desc: Headquartered live on the floor of the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) where the biggest companies in the world trade, “Squawk On The Street” tracks the action of every stock and gives you access to the treasury, currency and commodity action in real time.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Money Movers

programme.title: Closing Bell
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC's Scott Wapner, “Closing Bell” guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what's driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: E6 - One Dish Dinners
programme.desc: For those evenings you want to be anywhere but washing lots of pots after dinner, Donal has four recipes that are one pan wonders. There's a quick pork saltimbocca with borlotti beans with lots of earthy flavour that will jump in your mouth.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: Jamie cooks a trusty midweek traybake of roast veg and Camembert. He turns poached chicken into a creamy chicken & chive pie, serves up his easy green chilli salsa under sizzling butterflied prawns, and finishes it all off with decadent chocolate tiramisu.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Major transport in an open-cast mine. A huge steel frame has to be moved to another site. A job for heavy transport professional Randolf Peters. The route: an obstacle course. Tight bends, steep downhill sections and obstructing power lines have to be overcome. The heavy transport has to be kept in sight every second. This means running backwards for kilometres and precision work with heavy transport equipment.

programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are ready to watch a Captain Chloe film. Suddenly, the lights go out!

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E45 - TV Shop
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: E11 - The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: E46 - Ice Cream
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. But they are so focused on making sure each lick is fair, they don't notice their ice creams are melting.

programme.title: E10 - Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: E11 - Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: E12 - Sticks
programme.desc: Bella and Lift play with a stick that makes the perfect magic wand. They visit Patch, who has a tasty recipe - sticky stick critters!

programme.title: E19 - The River Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E28 - Wolong Panda Reserve, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit a nature reserve in China. But who's taking all the pandas' bamboo?

programme.title: E31 - Bus-Train
programme.desc: Cynthia is working on the bus so asks Stanley to take her passengers to the community centre. He uses Amare's tractor and trailer, his car, a boat, and a bath to make a Bus-Train.

programme.title: E41 - It's Time To Watch A Family Film
programme.desc: JoJo finds something old in the cupboard - it's a video tape. Time for a Gran Gran plan to see what's on it. Soon, they are off to the library to find out if Terrence can help.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E11 - Sheep Dog
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: E19 - The River Badge
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: E30 - The Boreal Forest, Canada
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: E29 - Go Jet Academy: Map Readers
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: E31 - Bus-Train
programme.desc: Cynthia is working on the bus so asks Stanley to take her passengers to the community centre. He uses Amare's tractor and trailer, his car, a boat, and a bath to make a Bus-Train.

programme.title: E47 - The Party Badge
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday!

programme.title: E46 - The Playing Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: E46 - Carrot Powers Up
programme.desc: Carrot wants to become super strong, so she restores Evil Pea's robot suit for herself.

programme.title: E88 - Listen
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: E2 - Gloves
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'gloves' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different types of gloves - green gloves, woolly gloves, fingerless gloves and glowing gloves!

programme.title: E2 - Mojo Rocks
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Old Boy (Digital Restored Version)
programme.desc: One night in 1988, ordinary-man OH Dae-su, who lives with his wife and an adorable baby daughter, is kidnapped. He later wakes up to find himself in a private makeshift prison. While suffering from his debacle, Dae-su becomes shocked when he watches the news and hears that his beloved wife was brutally murdered. 15 years later, Dae-su is released and he determines to find out the truth. He meets Mi-do, the cook of the restaurant Dae-su has his first-meal after his imprisonment, and tells her about his 15 years in confinement. Mi-do promises to help him seek vengeance. As the team approaches the truth, another shocking-secret is revealing....

programme.title: Why Is There A Black Market For Refrigerants In The Eu, And How Does It Wor
programme.desc: Reforms to phase out the most polluting gases are increasing prices for certified imports, and fueling a black market for cheaper, illegal imports from China. But not all gases are illegal , so tracing illicit imports is difficult. Sanctions are low, profits are high. The global warming potential of one 10kg cylinder is the same as driving 1.5 times around the world.

programme.title: Kalank
programme.desc: Long-buried secrets come to light when romance blossoms between a young daredevil and a beautiful woman in 1945 India. Release Year: 2019 Director: Abhishek Varman

programme.title: Laaga Chunari Mein Daag
programme.desc: This story is about a woman who does not hesitate in making sacrifices to financially support her family by working as an Escort. Release Year: 2007 Director: Pradeep Sarkar

programme.title: On The Run
programme.desc: Crack policeman Hsiang Ming is having a talk with his separated wife when a bullet from hired killer Ah Chui kills the wife, an anti-drug policewoman. Hsiang Ming goes after the killer but is told to keep off by senior officer Lu. In fact, Lu is head of a narcotics ring and lover of Hsiang Ming's ex-wife. She knows his secret, thus Lu hires Ah Chui to kill her. Then Lu sets about to kill every one connected with crime-the go-between and Ah Chui. On his death bed, the go-between tells Hsiang Ming where to find Ah Chui. This Hsiang Ming does. But Lu's men are coming to kill both of them. Hsiang Ming has to fight off the attackers. Hsiang Ming takes Ah Chui to his mother-in-law's house where Ah Chui meets Hsiang Ming's daughter and feels shameful. When Lu's men come, she saves the young girl and an injured Hsiang Ming. As Hsiang Ming's friends fail to stop Lu, Ah Chui takes Hsiang Ming to a secret hide out and nurses him. They become lovers...

E5 - Earth Week Nature Explorers
programme.desc: Join JJ & Cody as Earth Week nature explorers! Cody’s family goes on an autumn hike, playing in the leaves & making owl murals. Then, JJ & Cody turn a stream into a racetrack for walnut sailboats! The exploration continues as JJ captivates a butterfly, discovers tadpoles in the pond & becomes a junior scout on a camping trip. Plus, help the family rush to get the recycling out in time!

programme.title: E2 - Funny Feelings & Creative Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a day of funny feelings & creative fixes! A worried Dandy brings Fiona to the garage because her lights & sirens aren't working. Gecko discovers no fix is needed because Fiona is just feeling sad inside. Then, when Blue is anxious about school because Bobby doesn't look like the bus in his book, Gecko comes up with a creative plan to let the Mechs paint Bobby! Plus, Gecko finds a creative way to deal with a swarm of bees that have nested in Trevor's engine.

programme.title: E3 - Gecko’s Green Earth Week
programme.desc: Celebrate a green Earth Week with Gecko! He stops Weasel from cutting down a tree & teaches him why they are good for the planet. Then, Gecko & Grandma use rainwater to power a water wheel to recharge Green! The green inventions continue as Gecko builds a flying machine from junk, fixes a compost spreader & finds clever ways to save water at the garage!

programme.title: E10 - Exploring Nature For Earth Week
programme.desc: Get ready for exploring nature for Earth Week! Baby John goes camping & overcomes his fear of the dark by looking at beautiful stars. Then, the family visits the Grand Canyon to see eagles & lizards! The nature fun continues with a trip to the lake for swimming & fishing. Plus, Super Baby John helps clean up the park & the family plants a tree to take care of the environment!

programme.title: E3 - Gecko’s Green Earth Week
programme.desc: Celebrate a green Earth Week with Gecko! He stops Weasel from cutting down a tree & teaches him why they are good for the planet. programme.title: E2 - Underwater Learning Adventures!
programme.desc: Dive into some underwater learning adventures with The Sharksons! First, join the sea friends as they swim through the alphabet to learn their ABCs. Then, explore the vibrant hues of Splashy Reef with a journey to learn all the shades of a beautiful rainbow. The learning continues with important daily routines! Sing along with Tucker the Turtle as he takes a bath & watch as Baby Grub eagerly learns the importance of dental care by brushing her big, sharp shark teeth!

programme.title: Downsizing
